title: Everything Netherite
description: Turns every Armour, Tool, Mineral Block and Ores into Netherite!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0da0a56d8a9243b49db987239878e77c6c0e0d90.png)
# Everything Netherite Resource Pack

**HEY YOU!**

Sick of mixing gold and iron armor on your beautiful skin? This pack fixes that, everything that’s made of ores now looks like Netherite.

![Resource pack off](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17e169446f83b8f1af7e208da181bcbe67e52099_0.webp)

---

# ✨ Features

Replaces textures for armor, tools, ores, and all mineral-based items with Netherite.

Does not change stats, durability, knockback resistance, etc., remain the same

Leather armor still supports dyeing, so you can customize your colors!

![Resource pack on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58eeee9c8093c37b792e8a9bc6444aebfc308bd8_0.webp)

---

# 💡 Why Use It?

Perfect for players who want a consistent, sleek look across all items

Makes you look cool :3
